how to pay out profits to yourself#N##N#corporation tax is just the first step if you want to extract money from your company. you can take out profit in two main ways: #N##N#as a salary: you can pay yourself a wage through paye. this can be treated as a deductible business expense to lower your corporation tax, but it may be subject to income tax and national insurance. #N##N##N##N#yogatax#N##N# +3#N##N#as dividends: if the company has post-tax profits, it can issue dividends. you receive a tax-free dividend allowance, but anything above that is taxed at specific dividend rates depending on your overall personal income band. #N##N##N##N#yogatax#N##N# +1#N##N#to give you a precise breakdown of your potential tax bill, it would help to know:#N##N#what is your estimated annual profit?#N##N#do you have any other sources of personal income?#N##N#how do you plan to withdraw your profits (e.g., salary vs. dividends)?
